crons.comment: Weekly affiliate-payout aggregation — Mondays 1am UTC = 8am WIB. Requires CRON_SECRET env var; route returns 403 without it.
Daily subscription-expiry sweep — flips lapsed trials/active subs to past_due, and flips affected drivers to availability=offline so they drop off the marketplace. 18:00 UTC = 01:00 WIB next day.
Daily retention sweep — enforces privacy policy retention windows. Purges drivers cancelled > 30 days ago, audit_log rows > 90 days. 19:00 UTC = 02:00 WIB next day (runs after subscription expiry).

Nightly B2B reliability score recompute — ranks /business directory drivers by activity, rating, trips, tenure, subscription health. Top 10 per city get 'Top driver' badge. 20:00 UTC = 03:00 WIB next day.

Daily payment-intents expiry sweep — flips payment_intents.status from 'pending' to 'expired' for rows older than 24h. Snap popup dismissed before payment leaves orphan pending rows that otherwise accumulate forever. 21:00 UTC = 04:00 WIB next day.

Daily payment-reminder sweep — emails drivers + rental_company owners at T-7/T-3/T-1/T+1/T+7 of subscription expiry, plus anyone with a payment_intent stuck pending > 24h. Idempotent via payment_reminders_log. 01:00 UTC = 08:00 WIB (morning send).
